g.text: lke-vlan-controller — State machine (bulk IP assign, serial reboot)
IP assignment: done across all nodes in one pass (NEEDS_CONFIG → NEEDS_REBOOT)
• cordon → reboot → wait NotReady → wait Ready
Reboots are performed one node at a time; controller's node is deferred and handled last (self-evict)
Leader: renew Lease during long waits (wait loops call renew_lease)
